events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: rebar placement rough-complete, but missing chairs/supports (mat on dirt). This is a defect - rebar must be supported on chairs to maintain proper concrete cover. Mat on dirt means no bottom cover, non-compliant with ACI 318. Decision should be fail since it's non-compliant. Risk is high because the rebar will have inadequate cover and corrosion protection, structural integrity compromised.

Let me build the JSON.
